ANALYSIS_ARCHITECTURE_SCHEMA.name: analysis_architecture
ANALYSIS_ARCHITECTURE_SCHEMA.description: Full architecture analysis: workspace structure → dependency graph → hot paths → cycle detection → complexity hotspots. Persists in Honcho.

path.description: Absolute path to project root directory.

ANALYSIS_ASK_SCHEMA.name: analysis_ask
ANALYSIS_ASK_SCHEMA.description: Ask a natural language question about a codebase. Uses code analysis and Honcho context to answer questions about code structure, dependencies, and behavior.

question.description: A natural language question about the code.

path.description: Optional path to file or directory to analyze as context.

ANALYSIS_CODE_MOVE_SCHEMA.name: analysis_code_move
ANALYSIS_CODE_MOVE_SCHEMA.description: Verschiebt ein Symbol (Funktion/Klasse) zwischen Dateien via AST-Extraktion.

ANALYSIS_CODE_QUERY_SCHEMA.name: analysis_code_query
ANALYSIS_CODE_QUERY_SCHEMA.description: Smart Query Router für Code-Intelligence. Stellt eine Frage über Code und wählt automatisch das beste Tool.

intent.description: What you want: find_usage, definition, understand, overview, tests, diagnostics, callers, callees, structure, search_pattern

path.description: Absolute file or directory path

ANALYSIS_DEADCODE_SCHEMA.name: analysis_deadcode
ANALYSIS_DEADCODE_SCHEMA.description: Dead code analysis: finds unused imports, unused functions, orphaned error handlers, and impact analysis for removal.

path.description: Absolute path to file or directory to scan.

kinds.description: What kinds of dead code to find (default: ['all']).

ANALYSIS_DEPENDENCY_RISK_SCHEMA.name: analysis_dependency_risk
ANALYSIS_DEPENDENCY_RISK_SCHEMA.description: Bewertet Abhängigkeitsrisiken einer Datei oder eines Projekts. Kombiniert code_dependency_risk + code_complexity + code_hot_paths zu einem gewichteten Risk Score (0-10) mit Breakdown nach Kategorien.

path.description: Absolute file or directory path.

ANALYSIS_DIFF_ANALYSIS_SCHEMA.name: analysis_diff_analysis
ANALYSIS_DIFF_ANALYSIS_SCHEMA.description: Vergleicht zwei Git-Refs und zeigt geänderte Funktionen mit Complexity-Delta und Blast Radius. Nutzt code_diff_analysis + code_impact + code_git_diff_file.

path.description: Absolute path to git repository.

max_files.description: Max files to analyze in depth (default: 5).

ANALYSIS_DIFF_SCHEMA.name: analysis_diff
ANALYSIS_DIFF_SCHEMA.description: Compare two analysis results and show what changed. Accepts report dicts from analysis_inspect, analysis_architecture, or analysis_deadcode. Returns a structured diff with added/removed/changed findings.

ANALYSIS_DUPLICATES_SCHEMA.name: analysis_duplicates
ANALYSIS_DUPLICATES_SCHEMA.description: Findet duplizierte/ähnliche Code-Blöcke via AST-Vergleich. Nutzt code_duplicates für AST-basierte Duplikat-Erkennung mit konfigurierbarer Mindestlänge und Ähnlichkeitsschwelle.

path.description: Absolute path to project or file.

min_lines.description: Minimum lines for a duplicate block (default: 5).

ANALYSIS_FRAMEWORK_SCHEMA.name: analysis_framework
ANALYSIS_FRAMEWORK_SCHEMA.description: Zeigt das Framework-Profil eines Projekts an. Erkennt automatisch Technologie-Stack (Medusa, Next.js, React, Go, Docker, etc.) mit Confidence-Scoring und Evidence-Tracking.

path.description: Absoluter Pfad zum Projekt-Root.

ANALYSIS_GRAPH_QUERY_SCHEMA.name: analysis_graph_query
ANALYSIS_GRAPH_QUERY_SCHEMA.description: Durchsucht den Knowledge Graph eines Projekts. Baut via code_index einen SQLite-persistenten ImportGraph auf und erlaubt Abfragen zu Callern, Callees, Hot Paths, Zyklen und Dependency-Health.

path.description: Absolute path to project root.

symbol.description: File path or symbol name (for callers/callees).

ANALYSIS_GRAPH_SCHEMA.name: analysis_graph
ANALYSIS_GRAPH_SCHEMA.description: Generate a Mermaid diagram from analysis results. Takes a report from analysis_inspect, analysis_architecture, or analysis_deadcode and produces a Mermaid flowchart or graph showing dependencies, cycles, and hot paths.

type.description: Type of graph to generate (default: dependency).

ANALYSIS_INSPECT_SCHEMA.name: analysis_inspect
ANALYSIS_INSPECT_SCHEMA.description: Multi-step code analysis: symbol extraction → definition → references → call hierarchy → cycle detection → dependency graph in one call. Depth 1-5. Persists results in Honcho.

path.description: Absolute path to file or directory to analyze.

symbol.description: Optional specific symbol (function/class) to focus analysis on.

depth.description:
Analysis depth:
  1: symbols + overview + diagnostics
  2: + capsule + callers + callees
  3: + call_hierarchy + type_hierarchy + highlight
  4: + cycle_detector + dependency_graph + hot_paths
  5: + blast_radius + unused_finder + complexity

ANALYSIS_MIGRATION_SCHEMA.name: analysis_migration
ANALYSIS_MIGRATION_SCHEMA.description: Führt YAML-basierte Bulk-Migrationen über ein Projekt aus. Nutzt code_migration für AST-gewahrte Pattern-Replacements mit Dry-Run und detailliertem Reporting.

path.description: Project root or directory to apply migrations to.

rules.description: List of migration rules. Each rule has: pattern + rewrite + optional file_glob/language/name.

ANALYSIS_PATTERN_DISCOVER_SCHEMA.name: analysis_pattern_discover
ANALYSIS_PATTERN_DISCOVER_SCHEMA.description: Discover code patterns that look like bugs but aren't covered by any existing shared pattern. Scans a project for structural anomalies and compares them against the shared pattern repository. Returns candidate patterns for registration via bug_hunt_pattern(save).

path.description: Absolute path to the project or directory to scan.

min_frequency.description: Minimum occurrences to consider a pattern meaningful (default: 3).

ANALYSIS_PERFORMANCE_SCHEMA.name: analysis_performance
ANALYSIS_PERFORMANCE_SCHEMA.description: Performance analysis: finds bottlenecks, complexity hotspots, and slow paths in a file or project. Combines code_complexity, code_hot_paths, and code_inlay_hints in one call.

path.description: Absolute path to file or directory to analyze.

ANALYSIS_REPORT_SCHEMA.name: analysis_report
ANALYSIS_REPORT_SCHEMA.description: Generate a structured analysis report from findings and persist it in Honcho for future reference.

ANALYSIS_REVIEW_SCHEMA.name: analysis_review
ANALYSIS_REVIEW_SCHEMA.description: Automated Code Review für Änderungen zwischen Git-Refs. Kombiniert code_review_assistant + code_security_scan + code_diff_analysis für vollständigen PR-Review mit Diff-Analyse, Security-Check und Complexity-Delta.

path.description: Absolute path to git repository.

max_files.description: Max files to analyze in depth (default: 10).

ANALYSIS_RISK_SCHEMA.name: analysis_risk
ANALYSIS_RISK_SCHEMA.description: Multi-Faktor Risk Assessment für ein Projekt. Kombiniert dependency_risk + complexity + unused_finder + security_scan + hot_paths + duplicates zu einem Gesamt-Risk-Score (0-10).

path.description: Absolute path to project directory.

categories.description: Risk categories to include (default: all). Options: dependencies, complexity, deadcode, security, hotspots, duplicates

ANALYSIS_SECURITY_SCHEMA.name: analysis_security
ANALYSIS_SECURITY_SCHEMA.description: Security analysis: scans for orphaned error handlers, vulnerability patterns, and security anti-patterns in source code.

path.description: Absolute path to file or directory to scan.

kinds.description: What kinds of issues to scan for (default: ['all']).

ANALYSIS_TEST_INSIGHT_SCHEMA.name: analysis_test_insight
ANALYSIS_TEST_INSIGHT_SCHEMA.description: Analysiert die Testabdeckung eines Symbols oder Projekts. Nutzt code_tests_for_symbol + code_generate_tests um vorhandene Tests zu finden und fehlende Test-Scaffolds zu generieren.

path.description: Absolute path to file or directory.

symbol.description: Optional symbol name to focus analysis on.

generate.description: Generate test scaffolds for untested symbols (default: false).

ANALYSIS_TIMELINE_SCHEMA.name: analysis_timeline
ANALYSIS_TIMELINE_SCHEMA.description: Zeigt die Evolution eines Symbols oder Projekts über die Git-History. Nutzt code_timeline + code_git_log_symbol + code_diff_analysis um kompakte Timeline mit Autor, Datum, Änderungsart und Complexity-Trend zu liefern.

path.description: Absolute file or directory path.

symbol.description: Optional symbol name (function/class) für fokussierte Timeline.

ANALYSIS_TREND_SCHEMA.name: analysis_trend
ANALYSIS_TREND_SCHEMA.description: Trend analysis over time: queries Honcho for past analysis results and shows how metrics (symbol count, unused code, complexity hotspots, cycles) have changed over days/weeks.

scope.description: Scope to analyze (e.g. 'path=src/', 'module:user-service'). Empty = all scopes.

intent.description: Filter by analysis intent. Empty = all intents.

days.description: Number of days to look back (default: 30).

ANALYSIS_UI_GAP_SCHEMA.name: analysis_ui_gap
ANALYSIS_UI_GAP_SCHEMA.description: UI Gap Analysis: discovers all UI layers in a project (Next.js storefront, Medusa admin, API routes, Go handlers), extracts routes and backend modules, then compares them to identify coverage gaps. Shows which backend modules lack admin/storefront pages, which admin pages have no backend module (orphans), and which CRUD entities are missing detail views.

path.description: Absolute path to project root.

include_storefront.description: Include storefront routes in analysis (default: true).

include_admin.description: Include admin routes in analysis (default: true).

ANALYSIS_WATCH_SCHEMA.name: analysis_watch
ANALYSIS_WATCH_SCHEMA.description: Set up or manage an analysis watch (cron job). Creates a recurring cron job that periodically runs analysis_inspect or analysis_deadcode on a specified path and reports changes via Hermes cron.

path.description: Absolute path to the file or directory to watch.

frequency.description: Cron frequency: 'daily', 'hourly', or a cron expression (default: 'daily').

action.description: Action: create a watch, list active watches, or remove one.

name.description: Watch name (required for remove). Auto-generated for create.
